description: Canonical operator registry for Almadar. Generated from @almadar/std/modules. Consumed by orbital-compiler via include_str!.

std-os.description: OS-level event watchers for system triggers

ml-data.description: Data loading and preprocessing (Python compile target)

and.description: Logical AND (returns the last truthy value, NOT a boolean — short-circuit)

anim/frame-at.description: Frame index for elapsed time; loops by default, else clamps to last

anim/sheet-rect.description: Source rect {sx,sy,sw,sh} for a frame index on a sprite sheet

array/append.description: Add item to end (returns new array)

array/every.description: Check if all elements match predicate

array/filter.description: Keep elements matching predicate (returns same array element type as input)

array/find.description: Find first element matching predicate (element type of input array, undefined when no match)

array/findIndex.description: Find index of first element matching predicate (-1 if none)

array/first.description: Get first element (element type of input array, may be undefined when empty)

array/indexOf.description: Find index of item (-1 if not found)

array/insert.description: Insert item at index (returns new array)

array/last.description: Get last element (element type of input array, may be undefined when empty)

array/map.description: Transform each element (return type wraps the lambda result in an array)

array/nth.description: Get element at index (element type of input array, may be undefined out-of-bounds)

array/partition.description: Split array by predicate into [matches, nonMatches]

array/prepend.description: Add item to start (returns new array)

array/range.description: Generate numbers: (range n) => [0,n); (range start end) => [start,end); optional step

array/reduce.description: Reduce array to single value (return type matches the lambda result / init type)

array/reject.description: Remove elements matching predicate (returns same array element type as input)

array/remove.description: Remove item at index (returns new array)

array/removeItem.description: Remove first matching item (returns new array)

array/some.description: Check if any element matches predicate

async/all.description: Execute effects in parallel, wait for all to complete

async/debounce.description: Debounce an event (wait for pause in events)

async/delay.description: Wait for specified milliseconds, optionally execute an effect after

async/interval.description: Execute an effect periodically at a fixed interval

async/race.description: Execute effects in parallel, return first to complete

async/retry.description: Retry an effect with configurable backoff

async/sequence.description: Execute effects in sequence (one after another)

async/throttle.description: Throttle an event (emit at most once per interval)

behavior/call.description: Call a behavior service action. Returns the ServiceCallResult union — resolves to the specific member when the (behavior, action) pair is a literal.

behavior/compose.description: Compose N orbitals into one application schema. Wires events, picks layout, generates pages.

behavior/detect-layout.description: Auto-detect layout from orbital count and wiring topology. Returns single, tabs, sidebar, dashboard, or wizard-flow.

behavior/instantiate.description: Instantiate a behavior from the registry at runtime (meta-programming). Equivalent to compile-time `uses` but dynamic — the behavior name is a runtime value. Applies the same override surface (linkedEntity, events, config, fields).

behavior/pipe.description: Left-to-right composition. Each step receives the previous result as its first arg.

behavior/wire.description: Apply cross-orbital event wiring. Adds external emits/listens to inline traits.

call-service.description: Invoke an external service action. Optional trailing { emit: { success, failure } } options object attaches closed-circuit emit routing (V2 frame contract).

compose/compose-all.description: Compose all orbitals in the workspace into a single schema. Backed by composeBehaviors.

compose/compose-children.description: Compose child orbitals under a parent for recursive builds.

contract/clamp-output.description: Clamp output tensor to contract ranges

contract/entity-to-tensor.description: Convert entity fields to tensor via contract

contract/tensor-to-payload.description: Convert output tensor to event payload via contract

data/dataset.description: Create dataset from entity collection and contracts

ease/apply.description: Apply an easing curve to t∈[0,1]: linear, in-quad, out-quad, in-out-quad, in-cubic, out-cubic, in-out-cubic, elastic-out, bounce-out (unknown → linear)

emit.description: Emit an event onto the bus

evaluate.description: Evaluate a model against test cases (ML effect)

fetch.description: Fetch an entity (by id) or a collection (by filter) from persistence

fetch-stream.description: Stream an LLM or HTTP response, emitting on_message per chunk, success on completion, failure on error

fn.description: Lambda expression (used for per-item renders and transforms)

format/creditCard.description: Format credit card with masked digits

format/list.description: Format array as natural language list

forward.description: Run a forward pass through a model (ML effect)

geo/rect-circle-overlap.description: Rect-circle overlap via closest point on rect to circle center

geo/reflect.description: Reflect vector v across normal n (assumed normalized)

geo/segment-intersect.description: Intersection point of two segments, or null when parallel/none

graph/from-adjacency.description: Build graph from adjacency matrix and features

graph/from-edge-list.description: Build graph from edge list and features

graph/from-entities.description: Build PyG graph from entity collections

grid/cells-in-radius.description: All cells within Euclidean radius r (row-major order)

grid/in-bounds.description: Whether cell lies within a w×h grid

grid/line.description: Bresenham line cells from a to b, inclusive, in step order

grid/neighbors.description: Adjacent cells in order N,E,S,W (+NE,SE,SW,NW if diagonal)

grid/screen-to-iso.description: Screen point to isometric cell coordinates

if.description: Conditional expression (ternary). Return type is union of branch types.

integration/github-create-issue.description: Create a GitHub issue. Typed wrapper for the GitHub API.

integration/github-get-repo.description: Get a GitHub repository. Typed wrapper for the GitHub API.

integration/http.description: HTTP request with caller-declared response schema. Validates the response against the schema before returning.

let.description: Bind local variables for a body expression

list.description: Literal array constructor — evaluates each argument and returns them as an array. Lowering wraps a literal list bound for a literal-array slot in `list` so it is unambiguously data, never a call (disambiguates a list whose first element collides with an operator name, e.g. [path method …]).

llm/call-tools.description: Call the LLM with tool definitions. Returns the assistant response with optional tool calls and token usage.

llm/compact.description: Compact the context window. Returns before/after token counts.

llm/embed.description: Generate embeddings for an array of texts. Returns a 2D array of floats.

llm/generate.description: Generate text from an LLM. Returns the generated string.

llm/switch.description: Switch the active LLM provider and optionally the model.

llm/token-count.description: Get the current token count in the context window.

log.description: Emit a structured info log line (compiled + runtime)

lolo/emit-body.description: Emit a .lolo orbital body from the LLM (free-lolo path). Returns the emitted lolo source.

math/approach.description: Move cur toward target by at most maxDelta

math/atan2.description: Angle in radians from the positive x-axis to point (x, y)

math/cos.description: Cosine of an angle in radians

math/default.description: Return default if value is null, undefined, or NaN

math/lerp.description: Linear interpolation between a and b by factor t

math/map.description: Map value from one range to another

math/round.description: Round to nearest integer or specified decimals

math/sin.description: Sine of an angle in radians

math/tan.description: Tangent of an angle in radians

math/wrap.description: Wrap a value into the half-open range [min, max)

memory/list.description: List all memories, optionally filtered by category.

memory/recall.description: Search memories by semantic query. Returns matching memory records.

memory/store.description: Store a new memory. Returns the new memory ID.

nn/clone.description: Create a deep copy of the network with same weights

nn/dropout.description: Dropout layer for regularization (randomly zeros elements during training)

nn/getWeights.description: Get network weights as a flat tensor

nn/linear.description: Fully connected linear layer (output = input * weights + bias)

nn/paramCount.description: Get total number of trainable parameters

nn/sequential.description: Create a sequential neural network from layers

nn/setWeights.description: Set network weights from a flat tensor

nn/softmax.description: Softmax activation function (normalizes to probability distribution)

noise/fbm.description: Fractal Brownian motion: summed perlin octaves (clamped 1..8); output [-1,1]

noise/perlin.description: 2D Perlin noise at (x,y) with optional seed; output [-1,1]

noise/simplex.description: Value-coherent noise (perlin-derived) at (x,y) with optional seed; output [-1,1]

notify.description: Show a notification (in-app, email, push, sms)

object/empty?.description: Check if object has no keys

object/get.description: Get nested value by path (return type derived from input object shape and key)

object/pick.description: Select only specified keys (return type is subset of input object shape)

object/set.description: Set nested value by path (returns new object)

or.description: Logical OR (returns the first truthy value, NOT a boolean — short-circuit)

os/debounce.description: Configure debounce interval for an OS event type. Prevents trigger storms during rapid changes.

os/watch-cron.description: Register cron schedule. Emits OS_CRON_FIRE events with { expression, timestamp } payload.

os/watch-env.description: Register environment variable watcher. Emits OS_ENV_CHANGED events with { variable, oldValue, newValue } payload.

os/watch-files.description: Register file system watcher. Emits OS_FILE_MODIFIED, OS_FILE_CREATED, OS_FILE_DELETED events with { path, name, dir, timestamp } payload.

os/watch-http.description: Register HTTP response interceptor. Emits OS_HTTP_RESPONSE events with { url, method, status, headers, body, duration } payload.

os/watch-port.description: Register port monitor. Emits OS_PORT_OPENED, OS_PORT_CLOSED events with { port, protocol, pid, address } payload.

os/watch-process.description: Register process monitor. Emits OS_PROCESS_EXITED, OS_PROCESS_STARTED events with { pid, name, exitCode, signal, args, duration } payload.

os/watch-signal.description: Register OS signal handler. Emits OS_SIGNAL_USR1, OS_SIGNAL_HUP, etc. with { pid, timestamp } payload.

path.description: Build a dot-separated path string from segments. Used with set effect for dynamic field paths.

path/astar.description: A* shortest path on a w×h grid; returns cells start→goal (incl. both) or [] if none

path/reachable.description: BFS cells reachable within N moves from start (incl. start); sorted row-major

persist.description: Create, update, delete, clear, or batch entity records. Optional trailing { emit: { success, failure } } options object attaches closed-circuit emit routing.

prob/beta.description: Sample from a Beta(alpha, beta) distribution

prob/condition.description: Mark current sample as rejected if predicate is false

prob/credible-interval.description: Compute symmetric credible interval from samples

prob/flip.description: Bernoulli trial: returns true with probability p

prob/histogram.description: Bin numeric samples into a histogram

prob/infer.description: Like posterior but returns {mean, variance, samples, acceptRate}

prob/percentile.description: Get the p-th percentile (0-100) from samples

prob/posterior.description: Rejection sampling: returns accepted query values

prob/sample.description: Evaluate an expression n times and collect results

prob/seed.description: Set seeded PRNG for deterministic probabilistic sampling

prob/uniform.description: Sample from a uniform distribution [lo, hi)

ref.description: Reactive entity reference (deprecated, use fetch with listens in V2)

render-ui.description: Render a pattern into a UI slot

send-server.description: Send an orbital event to the server over WebSocket (client-side; chat/real-time trigger)

session/append-history.description: Append an entry to the per-orbital conversation history.

session/read-errors.description: Read validation errors for an orbital.

session/read-memory.description: Read the per-orbital memory from the session store.

session/read-spec.description: Read the per-orbital spec.json from the session store.

session/write-errors.description: Write validation errors for an orbital.

session/write-memory.description: Write per-orbital memory to the session store.

session/write-spec.description: Write the per-orbital spec.json to the session store.

set.description: Set a binding to a value

str/default.description: Return default if value is null/undefined/empty

str/endsWith.description: Check if string ends with suffix

str/padEnd.description: Pad string from end to target length

str/padStart.description: Pad string from start to target length

str/split.description: Split string into array by delimiter

str/startsWith.description: Check if string starts with prefix

tensor/allInRange.description: Check if all elements are within range [min, max]

tensor/cat.description: Concatenate two tensors along the last dimension

tensor/clamp.description: Clamp all elements to range [min, max]

tensor/clampPerDim.description: Clamp each dimension to its specified range

tensor/outOfRangeDims.description: Get dimensions that exceed their specified ranges

tensor/outOfRangeIndices.description: Get indices of elements outside range

tensor/rand.description: Create tensor with random values in [0, 1)

tensor/randn.description: Create tensor with random values from standard normal distribution

tensor/reshape.description: Reshape tensor to new shape (total elements must match)

tensor/squeeze.description: Remove all dimensions of size one

tensor/stack.description: Stack two tensors along a new leading dimension

tensor/transpose.description: Transpose a tensor (optionally swapping two named dimensions)

tensor/unsqueeze.description: Insert a dimension of size one at the given position

time/day.description: Get day of month from timestamp (1-31)

time/isAfter.description: Check if a is after b

time/isBefore.description: Check if a is before b

time/isBetween.description: Check if date is between start and end

time/isFuture.description: Check if timestamp is in the future

time/isPast.description: Check if timestamp is in the past

time/isSame.description: Check if timestamps are same (optionally by unit)

time/relative.description: Format as relative time ("2 hours ago", "in 3 days")

trace/emit.description: Emit a structured trace event for observability (115 call sites in rabit today).

trace/log.description: Log a message at the given level.

train.description: Train a model over a dataset (ML effect)

train/checkConstraints.description: Check if network weights satisfy all constraints

train/checkForbiddenOutputs.description: Check if model produces outputs in forbidden regions

train/checkRegression.description: Check if new model regresses on required invariants

train/checkWeightMagnitude.description: Check if all weights are within magnitude limit

train/clipGradients.description: Clip gradients to max norm (modifies in place)

train/clipWeights.description: Clip weights to max magnitude (modifies in place)

train/computeAdvantages.description: Compute GAE advantages for policy gradient

train/getMaxWeightMagnitude.description: Get maximum weight magnitude in network

train/huber.description: Huber loss (smooth L1, robust to outliers)

train/sampleBatch.description: Sample random batch from experience buffer

train/step.description: Execute single training step (forward, loss, backward, update)

train/validate.description: Validate model on test cases, returns pass/fail metrics

validate/array.description: Check if value is an array

validate/boolean.description: Check if value is a boolean

validate/check.description: Run multiple validation rules, return { valid, errors }

validate/creditCard.description: Check if value is a valid credit card number (Luhn algorithm)

validate/date.description: Check if value is a valid date

validate/email.description: Check if value is a valid email format

validate/length.description: Check if string/array has exact length

validate/maxLength.description: Check if string/array has maximum length

validate/minLength.description: Check if string/array has minimum length

validate/noneOf.description: Check if value is not in list of disallowed values

validate/number.description: Check if value is a number

validate/object.description: Check if value is an object

validate/oneOf.description: Check if value is in list of allowed values

validate/pattern.description: Check if string matches regex pattern

validate/phone.description: Check if value is a valid phone number

validate/range.description: Check if number is within range [min, max]

validate/required.description: Check if value is not null, undefined, or empty string

validate/string.description: Check if value is a string

validate/url.description: Check if value is a valid URL format

validate/uuid.description: Check if value is a valid UUID

validate/validate.description: Validate an orbital or the composed schema using orb validate.

vec/angle.description: Heading atan2(y,x) (1 arg) or angle between two vectors (2 args), radians

vec/normalize.description: Unit vector a/len; zero-length → zero vector (same dim)

vec/rotate.description: 2D rotate by rad (z preserved): x'=x·cos-y·sin, y'=x·sin+y·cos

when.description: Conditional effect without an else branch

workspace/archive-orbital.description: Archive (remove from active set) an orbital from the workspace.

workspace/exists.description: Check if a file exists in the workspace.

workspace/list-orbitals.description: List all orbital names in the workspace.

workspace/read-file.description: Read a file from the workspace.

workspace/read-orbital.description: Read an orbital definition from the workspace by name.

workspace/read-plan.description: Read the plan snapshot from the workspace.

workspace/read-schema.description: Read the composed schema.orb from the workspace.

workspace/write-file.description: Write a file to the workspace.

workspace/write-orbital.description: Write an orbital definition to the workspace.

workspace/write-plan.description: Write the plan snapshot to the workspace.

workspace/write-schema.description: Write the composed schema.orb to the workspace.
